calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-28-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-28-2005 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Michael Rossoff, Esq. for Plaintiff: TNDC.
James Shafer, Esq. for Defendants: Donice Darden and Marion Goodwin.
Parties reached a settlement by stipulation, but not read into the record.
Trial vacated.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-24-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: MICHAEL S. ROSSOFF FOR PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION
JAMES E. SHAFER FOR DEFENDANTS DONICE DARDEN AND MARION GOODWIN.

THIS CAUSE CAME ON REGULARLY FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE THIS DAY. ALL PARTIES WERE PRESENT AS INDICATED ABOVE. SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS WERE HELD. CASE DID NOT SETTLE. TRIAL DATE REMAINS.

JPT MARTE BASSI, CLERK CLARK BANAYAD, NOT REPORTED (218)
